generated_field_pattern.distance_to_nearest_{amenity}_m: Distance in meters to the nearest matched POI. Null if no matched POI is found.
generated_field_pattern.nearest_{amenity}_name: Name of the nearest matched POI. Null if no matched POI is found.
generated_field_pattern.near_{amenity}_count_1km: Number of matched POIs within 1 km.

metadata_fields.mapbox_enriched_at: Local timestamp when the property was enriched.

notes: Mapbox Tilequery returns POIs from vector tiles. The pipeline filters POIs by maki/type/class/name metadata, so category matching is best-effort.
The script is resumable: it writes checkpoint after each successful property.
Both Solution 1 and Solution 2 can use this Mapbox-enriched dataset as the shared final POI base.
